originalTitle: Russia agrees to stop using Kenyan recruits in Ukraine conflict, Kenya says
title: Russia agrees to stop using Kenyan recruits in Ukraine conflict, Kenya says
content: Some 1,000 Kenyans are believed to have recruited to fight in Ukraine - many say they were lured under false pretences.

originalTitle: Whistleblower murder suspect is former elite officer, South African police say
title: Whistleblower murder suspect is former elite officer, South African police say
content: Marius van der Merwe was shot dead three weeks after accusing police officers of killing a robbery suspect.

originalTitle: 'We will go wherever they hide': Rooting out IS in Somalia
title: 'We will go wherever they hide': Rooting out IS in Somalia
content: Somalia became a key part of IS's global network after fighters were driven out of strongholds in Syria and Iraq.

originalTitle: Trump claims strikes on Iran prevented nuclear war
title: Trump claims strikes on Iran prevented nuclear war
content: Donald Trump claimed he ordered strikes on Iran to prevent a nuclear conflict that would have turned into World War III.

originalTitle: Trump seeks to delay meeting with China’s Xi by ‘month or so’ amid Iran war
title: Trump seeks to delay meeting with China’s Xi by ‘month or so’ amid Iran war
content: The US president delays March 31-April 2 trip to China to focus on the escalating war against Iran.

originalTitle: ‘Fourth world nation’: Trump slams Somalia, Ilhan Omar
title: ‘Fourth world nation’: Trump slams Somalia, Ilhan Omar
content: Speaking at the Oval office, US President Donald Trump stated that Somalia is a “fourth world nation.”

originalTitle: Wary allies show there's no quick fix to Trump's Iran crisis
title: Wary allies show there's no quick fix to Trump's Iran crisis
content: European leaders are hesitant to help Trump secure the Strait of Hormuz, but they know inaction on the Iran war is not really an option.

originalTitle: Meta and TikTok let harmful content rise after evidence outrage drove engagement, say whistleblowers
title: Meta and TikTok let harmful content rise after evidence outrage drove engagement, say whistleblowers
content: Companies allowed more harmful content on user’s feeds, knowing their algorithms ran on outrage, BBC hears.

originalTitle: Iran hits key UAE oil port and Dubai airport
title: Iran hits key UAE oil port and Dubai airport
content: The port of Fujairah plays a crucial role in helping keep global supplies moving when the Strait of Hormuz is blocked.

originalTitle: How Chelsea signed a star team with hidden payments
title: How Chelsea signed a star team with hidden payments
content: Chelsea have been hit with a Premier League record fine of £10.75m and handed a suspended transfer ban. Here's what the written reasons said.

originalTitle: Scotland boss Clarke 'hasn't had contract offer'
title: Scotland boss Clarke 'hasn't had contract offer'
content: National coach Steve Clarke says the Scottish FA "haven't put an offer in front of me" as he nears the end of his current deal.

originalTitle: Thiago and Rayan receive first Brazil call-ups
title: Thiago and Rayan receive first Brazil call-ups
content: Brentford striker Igor Thiago and Bournemouth winger Rayan receive first call-ups to the Brazil squad for their friendlies with France and Croatia later this month.
